hooks.command: grep -rn 'SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE\|ALPACA_SECRET\|ANTHROPIC_API_KEY\|ALPACA_API_KEY\|FINNHUB_API_KEY\|ALPHA_VANTAGE_API_KEY' --include='*.ts' --include='*.tsx' --include='*.js' --include='*.jsx' frontend/ 2>/dev/null && echo '⚠️  WARNING: API key reference found in frontend code!' || true
